name: Torre Branca
content: I was in Milan for an aerospace conference, and they organized a party at Torre Branca. The party was fun, the drinks lines were unfathomably long, water was 5 Euro, and I met a bunch of cool people there. I went to the bathroom around 1 AM before heading back to the hotel There was still more aerospace conferencing the next day, what was I thinking by staying out so late? when I entered a different area of the club and found out they had strippers. At an event organized by an aerospace conference, where most people were scientists or engineers. My bible belt colleague’s brains would’ve exploded, but luckily they didn’t need to go to the bathroom and remained blissfully unaware of the blasphemy occurring beneath their feet.
